arts.ttl: Real Madrid summer departure ‘hopes’ to return to the club

arts.ttl: Real Madrid identify Liverpool transfer target as Trent Alexander-Arnold alternative
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly considering an alternative to Liverpool defender Trent Alexander-Arnold as the search for a new right-back continues.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid pair face late fitness tests for Celta Vigo clash
arts.sum: Two leading members of the first-team ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid are in something of a race against time to be declared fit to feature from the off…

arts.ttl: When is Real Madrid vs Borussia Dortmund? Times, how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: Having suffered a surprise defeat on matchday two, holders Real Madrid will bid to get their Champions League campaign back on track when they host Borussia Dortmund - the team they beat in last season’s final . The Champions League matchday-three game between Real Madrid and Borussia Dortmund will be played at the Estadio Santiago Bernabéu in Madrid, Spain, on Tuesday October 22, 2024.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid yet to expel former member of far-right ultra group despite violent incidents
arts.sum: Real Madrid have long-since managed to ensure the neo-nazi Ultra Sur group do not enter the Santiago Bernabeu as a group, but some of their members continue to attend games, and even hold power over tickets. One name in particular is a regular offender. Former Ultras Sur leader Carlos Clara remains a fixture at home […] The post Real Madrid yet to expel former member of far-right ultra group despite violent incidents appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for La Liga match against Celta Vigo
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Saturday’s match against Celta Vigo in La Liga, the first after the past FIFA break. HOW TO WATCH, STREAM LA LIGA

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti confirms Real Madrid’s plans for the January transfer window
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has on Friday provided an insight into the club’s plans for the upcoming winter transfer window. And the news will no doubt be met…

arts.ttl: Unprecedented rush for tickets for this month’s Clásico between Real Madrid and Barcelona
arts.sum: Real Madrid put tickets on general sale this Friday for the biggest game in Spanish football, El Clásico, with Barcelona visiting the Santiago Bernabéu on Saturday 26 October. Millions of people have been patiently waiting, in some cases for several hours to have the chance to watch the match between Ancelotti’s Madrid and Flick’s Barça in person, from the stands.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti says Mbappé 'not affected' by reports of investigation in Sweden
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti says Kylian Mbappé “is not affected” by the Swedish media reports this week that said the France captain was the subject of a rape investigation. The reports in Swedish media came out after the striker visited Stockholm during the international break when he was not called up by France due to a minor injury.

Meanwhile, the Frenchman’s arrival has also seen a reduction in final-third proficiency from Jude Bellingham, who is yet to score his first club goal of the season and has been forced to move into a deeper role due to the addition of Mbappe. The France international finally joined Los Blancos in July after years of speculation, with Florentino Perez finalising an agreement for Mbappe to join the club before his disappointing Euro 2024 campaign.
